query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `credential_alert_rules` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `cred_alert_credential_id` int NOT NULL,
  `alert_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `threshold_days` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `alert_is_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `alert_notify_owner` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `alert_last_checked_at` timestamp NULL,
  `alert_last_alerted_at` timestamp NULL,
  `alert_next_alert_at` timestamp NULL,
  `alert_created_by` varchar(255),
  `alert_created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
